tool.name: isochore
tool.summary: Report a bounded isochore profile and emit a line-plot contract

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: `isochore` is the next bounded plotting continuation after the shipped `wobble` slice. The EMBOSS-RS v1 surface computes one deterministic sliding-window bounded isochore profile for exactly one nucleotide sequence and emits both a stable analytical table and a typed single-series line-plot contract.

sections.title: Inputs
sections.content: This tool accepts exactly one nucleotide sequence record. v1 supports DNA and RNA inputs that pass nucleotide validation, treats `--window` and `--step` as positive residue counts, defaults to `--window 11` and `--step 1`, and rejects non-nucleotide inputs.

sections.title: Outputs
sections.content: The implementation emits a stable analytical table with `sequence_id`, `window_start`, `window_end`, `window_length`, `canonical_symbols`, `ambiguous_symbols`, `ignored_gap_symbols`, `at_fraction`, `gc_fraction`, `gc_percent`, and `isochore_band`. The staged v1 line-plot contract remains single-series and plots the analytically derived `gc_percent` values from the same governed computation path.

sections.title: Plotting Integration
sections.content: Rust does not render figures. The formal contract emitted by `isochore` is the governed handoff to the sister `emboss-r` package, which owns graphical rendering. This shipped `isochore` slice intentionally stays single-series and renderer-agnostic even though the analytical table exposes richer bounded nucleotide-composition detail.

sections.title: Current Status
sections.content: This method is implemented and exposed through `emboss-rs isochore`. Validation now covers stable analytical rows plus compared acceptance evidence for the canonical checked-in GC-percent line-plot contract emission path, while keeping rendering in the sister `emboss-r` package.

sections.title: Caveats
sections.content: v1 supports only the single-record bounded isochore profile and does not add Rust-side rendering, multi-series plotting, segmentation tracks, or a generalized plotting framework. Additional continuation should remain bounded by the explicit fallback-activation stop conditions already recorded in governance.

artifacts.label: Nucleotide fixture for governed isochore validation
artifacts.description: Repository-managed nucleotide fixture used for deterministic isochore validation.

artifacts.label: Canonical isochore line-plot contract fixture
artifacts.description: Repository-managed canonical GC-percent line-plot contract fixture emitted by the governed isochore implementation.

examples.title: Compute a deterministic bounded isochore profile
examples.description: Reports deterministic sliding-window isochore rows from the committed nucleotide fixture and emits a governed single-series GC-percent line-plot contract from the same analytical run.

expected_outputs.label: Isochore analytical table
expected_outputs.description: Stable sliding-window bounded isochore rows with explicit GC, AT, and band columns.

expected_outputs.label: GC-percent line-plot contract
expected_outputs.description: The governed single-series GC-percent line-plot contract JSON emitted from the same deterministic analytical run.
